profile.title: Profile
profile.dataExportDescription: Export all your personal data in compliance with GDPR. Your export will be available for 7 days.
profile.bothDatesRequired: Please provide both start and end dates, or leave both empty.
profile.noExportsYet: No exports yet. Request your first export above.
profile.rightToBeForgottenDescription: Request deletion of all your personal data in compliance with GDPR. This action cannot be undone after the 30-day recovery period.
profile.deletionItem2: Anonymize your participation in other recordings
profile.deletionItem3: Delete all tasks, summaries, and chat conversations
profile.deletionRecoveryPeriod: You have 30 days to cancel this request after it's processed.
profile.deleteMyDataConfirmation: I understand that this action will permanently delete all my personal data and cannot be undone after the 30-day recovery period.
profile.recoveryPeriodDescription: Your data has been anonymized but can still be recovered for {count} more day{count, plural, one {} other {s}}. After this period, the deletion will be permanent.
profile.permanentDeletionDescription: The recovery period has ended. Your data has been permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
profile.privacyRightsDescription: Exercise your GDPR rights to restrict processing (Art. 18) or object to processing (Art. 21) of your personal data.
profile.privacyInfo: Right to Restriction (Art. 18) temporarily halts processing of your data while a dispute is resolved. Right to Object (Art. 21) allows you to object to processing based on legitimate interest. Requests are reviewed by our Data Protection Officer within 30 days.
profile.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe why you are making this request...

agentConfig.maxTokensDescription: Maximum number of tokens in the response (1-100,000)
agentConfig.maxContextTokensDescription: Maximum number of tokens for context window (1-100,000)
agentConfig.topPDescription: Nucleus sampling: controls diversity via nucleus probability
agentConfig.frequencyPenaltyDescription: Reduces likelihood of repeating tokens (-2 to 2)
agentConfig.presencePenaltyDescription: Increases likelihood of talking about new topics (-2 to 2)
